User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the Campus Cafe Connect application.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

favorites.description: A list of menu item IDs that the user has favorited.

MenuItem.title: MenuItem
MenuItem.description: Represents an item available on the cafe menu.

id.description: Unique identifier for the MenuItem entity.

category.description: Category of the menu item (e.g., South Indian, North Indian).

id.description: Unique identifier for the Order entity.

orderDate.description: Date and time when the order was placed.

OrderItem.title: OrderItem
OrderItem.description: Represents an item within an order, including quantity.

id.description: Unique identifier for the OrderItem entity.

quantity.description: Quantity of the menu item in the order.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user.

definition.description: Stores information about each menu item.

params.name: menuItemId
params.description: The unique identifier for the menu item.

definition.description: Stores order information for each user. Path-based ownership for secure access.

params.description: The unique identifier for the user.

params.name: orderId
params.description: The unique identifier for the order.

definition.description: Stores individual items within an order. Path-based ownership continues to ensure data integrity and security.

firestore.reasoning: The Firestore data structure is designed to support the Campus Cafe Connect application, focusing on user orders and menu management. It prioritizes authorization independence by using path-based ownership for user-specific data. The structure includes collections for users, menu items, orders, and order items. All user owned data follows a path based ownership model. This ensures that list operations are secure, since only the authenticated user can access data in `/users/{userId}`.
